title: USD/JPY
text: USD/JPY testing 159.18, approaching the 160.00 level that has previously triggered BoJ verbal warnings; intervention risk rises on a sustained break above 160.

title: AUD/USD
text: AUD/USD holding below 0.7090, Australian business confidence plunges to -29 as Iran war shock hits outlook, RBA’s Hauser warns of stagflation risk.

title: EUR/USD
text: EUR/USD trading at 1.1763, war drags on, recession risk rises, and global trade growth slows sharply, EUR net long positioning at 77.3%.

title: VIX
text: VIX at 19.1 signals normal volatility — risk-on environment, S&P 500 up +1.02%.

title: USD/JPY Correlation Break
text: USD/JPY vs VIX correlation break, JPY no longer acting as safe haven, z=+1.53σ.
